pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java compiler source and target version from 1.8 to 11 to support the new JDK.
Add explicit JAXB runtime dependency because it was removed from the JDK standard library in Java 11.
Add explicit javax.annotation-api dependency because java.annotation packages were removed from the JDK in Java 11.
Upgrade Spring Boot from 1.2.5 to 2.3.7 to ensure compatibility with Java 11 and modern ecosystem standards.
Upgrade Hibernate from 4.3.6 to 5.4.25 to align with Spring Boot 2.x and Java 11 requirements.
Upgrade Liquibase from 3.3.2 to 4.2.2 to support newer database drivers and Java 11.
Replace Joda-Time dependencies with Java 8+ java.time (JSR-310) support, which is native in Java 11.
Switch Jackson Hibernate module from version 4 to version 5 to match the upgraded Hibernate version.
Replace legacy Springfox Swagger 2 dependencies with OpenAPI 3 compatible Springfox OAS dependencies.
Remove deprecated Spring Cloud Connectors dependencies which are no longer supported in modern Spring Boot versions.
Remove legacy metrics reporter dependency in favor of Micrometer.
Configure maven-compiler-plugin to use Java 11 source and target levels.
Migrate annotation processing from maven-processor-plugin to maven-compiler-plugin annotationProcessorPaths.
pom.xml.human_impl: Moved MapStruct, Hibernate JPA Metamodel, and JAXB processors to maven-compiler-plugin configuration.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Liquibase plugin to use Hibernate 5 connector instead of Hibernate 4.
pom.xml.human_impl: Changed dependency from liquibase-hibernate4 to liquibase-hibernate5.

package.json.general_idea: Update the required Node.js version to 14.15.0 to align with modern tooling and JDK 11 era build environments.
Replace the legacy Grunt-based build system and AngularJS dependencies with Angular 11 and the Angular CLI.
package.json.human_impl: Removed grunt and karma dependencies; added @angular/core, @angular/cli, and related Angular 11 packages.

package.json.general_idea: Switch the frontend testing framework from Karma/Jasmine to Jest for better performance and integration with Angular CLI.
package.json.human_impl: Removed karma and jasmine-core; added jest, @angular-builders/jest, and related Jest dependencies.

package.json.general_idea: Modernize the build process by replacing Grunt tasks with Webpack and Angular CLI scripts.
package.json.human_impl: Replaced 'grunt test' script with comprehensive npm scripts for webpack, docker, and CI/CD.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Update Spring Boot datasource configuration to use HikariCP and standard JDBC URL format required by newer Spring Boot versions.
Refactor JPA properties to align with Spring Boot 2.x naming conventions and remove deprecated Hibernate settings.
Move Liquibase configuration under the spring namespace to comply with Spring Boot 2.x externalized configuration standards.
Remove legacy Dropwizard metrics configuration which is no longer supported or configured via application.yml in modern JHipster/Spring Boot.
Introduce JHipster-specific configuration properties (cache, cors, security) required by the updated framework version.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Switched from legacy MySQL JDBC driver to HikariCP connection pool with updated JDBC URL parameters required for modern MySQL drivers.
Removed deprecated EJB3NamingStrategy in favor of default Hibernate 5+ naming strategies.
Updated Ehcache region factory class to the version compatible with Hibernate 5 and Java 11.
Replaced legacy Spring Boot Actuator metrics (Spark/Graphite) with Micrometer-based Prometheus export configuration.
Migrated JHipster-specific configuration properties to the new `jhipster` namespace structure introduced in JHipster 6.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Boot 1.x actuator properties with Spring Boot 2.x management configuration structure.
Update async thread pool configuration to use Spring Boot 2.x task execution properties.
Add comprehensive JPA and Hibernate configuration properties required for Spring Boot 2.x compatibility.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.human_impl: Added 'spring.jpa' block with settings for 'open-in-view', 'hibernate.jdbc.time_zone', and cache settings.
